ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marcus Chang for Tanya Agonafer and Netsanet Alemayehu (via Zoom).
Tanya Agonafer was present via Zoom.

Mr. Chang confirmed that no objections to the petition were received and that all relevant relatives or interested parties had signed consents and waivers of notice.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated April 8, 2014 is admitted to probate. Tanya Agonafer and Netsanet Alemayehu are appointed as the Executors with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
